iOS Performance

This dashboard tracks iOS performance for all US Fantasy Growth Shows, with daily and weekly breakdowns across relevant metrics. Refer to tab iOS Deepdive for more insights and details.

Daily

Weekly

This dashboard helps deep-dive into iOS spend distribution for US Fantasy growth shows to identify potential performance issues. Check weekly spend splits across media sources, optimization, and LA codes, along with a daily media source spend breakdown.

Retention View

This dashboard shows Retention performance (via QS) and normalized retention metrics at the ad set level, segmented by show, platform, and media source. Use the filters to analyze cohort maturity and track week-by-week retention trends.

  • Ad Set ID selection is mandatory.
  • Campaign ID selection is optional.
